---
title: "05: Plots"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

### Load Libraries and Data

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)

csv_dir <- "C:/Users/dkucirek/Documents/Derm-SRP/csv/"
fig_dir <- "C:/Users/dkucirek/Documents/Derm-SRP/figures/"
if (!dir.exists(fig_dir)) dir.create(fig_dir, recursive = TRUE)

fig1_raw <- fread(file.path(csv_dir, "Combined_Cohort_Severity.csv"))

# Keep only 4 severity strata + SI; exclude Any Clinical Depression and Continuous PHQ
fig1_data <- fig1_raw[Analysis %in% c(
  "Mild (PHQ 5-9)",
  "Moderate (PHQ 10-14)",
  "Moderately Severe (PHQ 15-19)",
  "Severe (PHQ 20-27)",
  "Suicidal Ideation"
)]

# Suicidal Ideation on top, Mild on bottom
fig1_data[, Outcome := factor(Analysis, levels = c(
  "Mild (PHQ 5-9)",
  "Moderate (PHQ 10-14)",
  "Moderately Severe (PHQ 15-19)",
  "Severe (PHQ 20-27)",
  "Suicidal Ideation"
))]

fig1 <- ggplot(fig1_data, aes(y = Outcome, x = Estimate)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = CI_Lower, xmax = CI_Upper),
                width = 0.15, linewidth = 0.8, color = "#1F4E79",
                orientation = "y") +
  geom_point(shape = 18, size = 4, color = "#1F4E79") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    name   = "Risk Ratio (95% CI)",
    limits = c(0.9, 2.2),
    breaks = c(1.0, 1.2, 1.4, 1.6, 1.8, 2.0)
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(name = "") +
  labs(
    title    = "Figure 1. Depression Symptom Risk by\nPHQ 9 Score in Dermatologic Patients vs Matched Controls",
    subtitle = "4,535 cohort patients vs 88,668 propensity score matched controls"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5, color = "gray40"),
    axis.title.x       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text          = element_text(color = "black"),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.4),
    plot.margin        = margin(20, 30, 20, 20)
  )

print(fig1)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Figure1_PHQ_Severity_Forest.png"),
       fig1, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
cat("Figure 1 saved.\n")

# ── FIGURE 2 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

fig2_raw <- fread(file.path(csv_dir, "All_Condition_Results.csv"))

fig2_data <- fig2_raw[, .(
  Condition   = Condition,
  RR          = AnyClin_RR,
  CI_lo       = AnyClin_CI_lo,
  CI_hi       = AnyClin_CI_hi,
  Significant = AnyClin_Sig
)]

# Alphabetical order: A-Z bottom to top
fig2_data[, Condition := factor(Condition,
  levels = rev(sort(unique(as.character(Condition)))))]

cat("Condition factor levels (bottom to top):\n")
print(levels(fig2_data$Condition))

fig2 <- ggplot(fig2_data, aes(y = Condition, x = RR)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = CI_lo, xmax = CI_hi, color = Significant),
                width = 0.2, linewidth = 0.8,
                orientation = "y") +
  geom_point(aes(color = Significant, shape = Significant), size = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = "#1F4E79", "FALSE" = "#7F7F7F"),
    labels = c("TRUE" = "Yes", "FALSE" = "No"),
    name   = "Significance"
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = 18, "FALSE" = 18),
    labels = c("TRUE" = "Yes", "FALSE" = "No"),
    name   = "Significance"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    name   = "Risk Ratio (95% CI)",
    limits = c(0.2, 3.2),
    breaks = c(0.5, 1.0, 1.5, 2.0, 2.5, 3.0)
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(name = "") +
  labs(
    title    = "Figure 2. Clinically Significant Depression Symptom Risk by\nDermatologic Condition",
    subtitle = "Nine dermatologic conditions vs individually matched controls."
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5, color = "gray40"),
    axis.title.x       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text          = element_text(color = "black"),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.4),
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    legend.title       = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 9),
    plot.margin        = margin(20, 30, 20, 20)
  )

print(fig2)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Figure2_Condition_Forest.png"),
       fig2, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
cat("Figure 2 saved.\n")
```
